title: codereview pass 1: outdated wire format comment in announce.rs
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:1-19 - wire format doc and FIXED_LENGTH still show pre-CCP-9 (no current_channel byte after sig at offset 93). Matches Python update but Rust doc lags. P2 correctness. codereview
close_reason: Updated wire format doc, FIXED_LENGTH, struct, from_bytes, builder, tests, scheduler signed_data and builder to include current_channel=0 per CCP-9 and Python parity. All tests updated and roundtrip verified.
